prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约19317→19208→20215→19063→20410名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近5年累计后移约1093名；2025年基准位次约20410名，较2024年上升约1347名（位次数字增大，竞争加剧）；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021年96人、2022年94人、2023年94人、2024年95人、2025年99人，呈小幅递增；2026年计划大幅增至120人，较2025年扩招约21.2%，显著增加招生名额，对报考竞争有稀释作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第73名，近年排名在60–73区间波动，整体处于中上水平；该校近年声誉舆情无明显正面或负面信号；抖音综合热度未进入全国高校前100名，短视频平台关注度一般；未见投档线断档或异常记录；以石油石化特色为核心，石油与天然气工程、地质资源与地质工程等为传统优势领域，但第五轮学科评估数据。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校核心招生专业（石油工程、化工与制药类、机械类、材料类等）多属传统工科及能源领域，社会整体热度中等；计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等热门专业在该校亦有开设但招生人数较少；湖北省2026年普通高考总人数约39.37万，较2025年（约39.12万）微增约0.6%，物理类考生估算约25.2万人，与2025年基本持平；中国石油大学（华东）位于山东青岛，非湖北省本地高校，无本地招生偏好加成。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次20410名、2026年大幅扩招约21.2%（显著稀释竞争）、湖北省考生总数微增（竞争略加剧）及学校排名小幅波动等因素，以，再结合考生规模微增及扩招稀释效应的综合权衡，预测2026年物理类最低位次约23158名，区间22658–23658名。扩招是推动位次数字上移的最关键因素，考生总数微增和排名小幅下降亦起辅助作用。

一档（最难进）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 自动化
- 电子信息工程
- 数据科学与大数据技术。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 石油工程
- 机械类（智能装备工程）
- 新能源科学与工程
- 软件工程
- 油气储运工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 化工与制药类
- 材料类
- 地质学/资源勘查工程
- 英语/会计学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在22658–23658区间内，建议以二档专业（石油工程、机械类、新能源等学校核心特色专业）为主攻方向，一档热门专业（电气、自动化、电子信息等）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（化工、材料、地质等）作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<22658名）时可重点冲刺一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（>23658名）时建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 19317 → 19208 → 20215 → 19063 → 20410, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1093 positions over the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 20410, an increase of about 1347 positions compared to 2024 (ranking number increases, competition intensifies); the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hubei Province was 96 in 2021, 94 in 2022, 94 in 2023, 95 in 2024, and 99 in 2025, showing a slight increase; the 2026 plan significantly increases to 120, an expansion of about 21.2% compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment slots, which has a diluting effect on application competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 73rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with fluctuations in the 60–73 range in recent years, overall at an upper-middle level; the university's recent reputation and public opinion show no significant positive or negative signals; its comprehensive popularity on Douyin has not entered the top 100 national universities, indicating average attention on short video platforms; no records of abnormal admission score cutoffs or anomalies; with a core focus on petroleum and petrochemicals, petroleum and natural gas engineering, geological resources and geological engineering are traditional strengths, but the fifth round of discipline evaluation data is not available.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university's core admission majors (petroleum engineering, chemical and pharmaceutical engineering, mechanical engineering, materials science, etc.) are mostly in traditional engineering and energy fields, with moderate overall social popularity; popular majors such as computer science, electrical engineering, and electronic information are also offered but with fewer enrollment slots; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Hubei Province general college entrance examination is about 393,700, a slight increase of about 0.6% compared to 2025 (about 391,200), with an estimated 252,000 Physics Category candidates, roughly the same as 2025; China University of Petroleum (East China) is located in Qingdao, Shandong, not a local university in Hubei Province, so there is no local admission preference bonus.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 20410, the significant enrollment expansion of about 21.2% in 2026 (significantly diluting competition), the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Hubei Province (slightly intensifying competition), and minor fluctuations in university ranking, and after a comprehensive trade-off of the slight increase in candidate numbers and the dilution effect of expansion, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 23158, with a range of 22658–23658. Expansion is the most critical factor driving the ranking number upward, while the slight increase in candidate numbers and minor ranking decline also play auxiliary roles.

- Data Science and Big Data Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

- English/Accounting.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For predicted rankings in the 22658–23658 range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (petroleum engineering, mechanical engineering, new energy, etc., the university's core characteristic majors) as the main direction, with Tier 1 popular majors (electrical engineering, automation, electronic information, etc.) as sprint options, and Tier 3 majors (chemical engineering, materials, geology, etc.) as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<22658), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>23658), it is recommended to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.
